text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Right before the start of the JBC Sprint, Haru
Urara is filled with a strong desire to win and even
gets nervous.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She knows that she needs to gain more fans and
place well in the rankings.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that in mind, full of motivation and her
spirits high, she heads toward the race.
